## Summary

What changed?

## Why

What problem does this solve?

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run check:prod`
- [ ] Tested on desktop
- [ ] Tested on mobile if UI/audio changed

## Risk Check

- [ ] No secrets or private data committed
- [ ] No raw contributor audio committed
- [ ] No Supabase service-role key committed
- [ ] Database migration included if schema changed
- [ ] RLS/auth impact reviewed if API changed
- [ ] Consent/provenance impact reviewed if data flow changed

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or recordings for UI changes.

## Notes For Reviewer

Anything the reviewer should focus on?
